title: Teladoc Health Inc (TDOC) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Challenges and Seizing Opportunities
text: Teladoc Health Inc Q1 2025 Earnings Call Highlights. Recent Chronic Care Enrollment: Q1 2026 chronic care enrollment 1.2 million members, up 1% sequentially and 4% year-over-year from increased multi-condition bundle adoption. Q4 2025 chronic care enrollment 1.19 million, up 2% sequentially. Bundled Products Growth: Bundled products now represent 70% of chronic care offerings, indicating significant product mix shift. U.S. Integrated Care Membership: U.S. Integrated Care membership Q1 2026 was 101.2 million, above guidance range. Expected to decline modestly due to government program reductions and ACA enhanced subsidies expiration. Strategic Positioning: Macro environment mixed but company having strategic conversations with health plans about services helping them. Enhanced 24/7 care offerings and other solutions resonating well. Clinical foundations and AI capabilities seen as opportunities to drive stronger ROI and growth in Chronic Care.
